headline: Hezbollah Bro BOMBS Synagogue 😱🚀💥 – IDF YEETS Terror Twink!
text:
Michigan synagogue SLAMMED 💥🚚🕍 by Ayman Muhammad Ghazali 🕌🔥, 41yo Lebanese import 🇱🇧➡️🇺🇸 who RAMMED his EXPLOSIVE TRUCK 🎆🍆💦 straight into Temple Israel like a jihadi joyride 😈🏎️! Broski Ibrahim Muhammad Ghazali? HEZBOLLAH BADR UNIT BOSS 👹🚀💣 slinging ROCKETS at Israeli civvies 📈😱 – IDF said 'BYE FELICIA' 💥🛩️ and ELIMINATED that terror twink LAST WEEK in Lebanon airstrike 🔥🇮🇱! Family got WIPED in March strike too 🪦👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 – two bros Hezbollah rocket chads in south Lebanon per CBS snitches 🕵️‍♂️📡, but Ayman snapped HARD 😤💔 after 'devastating losses' overseas, per Dearborn Heights Mayor Mo Baydoun 🗣️ – no excuse for this HATE MOBILE 🚛🧨 tho!

Truck BED PACKED with COMMERCIAL FIREWORKS 🎇💥 and JUGS of FLAMMO LIQUID 🛢️🔥 that went BRRRR 😩💨 igniting the chaos! Ayman ate a SELFIE GLOCK POP 🔫💀 during FBI shootout Friday – no kiddos or synagogue staff hurt 🙌🛡️, just security guard dinged up (he'll bounce back 💪) and 30 cops hacking smoke 😷🚔. FBI calling it TARGETED JEW-HATE HIT 🎯🕍😡 – Gov Gretchen Whitmer 👩‍💼🚨 screaming ANTISEMITISM at 'HISTORIC HIGH' 📈🕎, begging big mouths to CHILL THE RHETORIC 🤫📢 or it's antisem writ LARGE AF!

Hezbollah IRAN SIMP SQUAD 🇮🇷🧎‍♂️ labeled TERROR ORG by Israel🇮🇱, UK🇬🇧, US🇺🇸 – BBC sniffing but no confirm yet 📰🤷‍♂️. Ayman naturalized 2011 in Dearborn Heights hood 🌆, motive? PROBABLY revenge for bro's YEET 🎾💀 – Wall Street? Nah, this is MIDEAST DRAMA spilling to Michigan like falafel fallout 🥙💥! IDF X-post SPILLING TEA ☕: Ibrahim commanded 'hundreds of rockets' – straight Hezbollah HYPE BEAST gone GHOST 👻🚀. Whitmer channeling her inner MOMMY MODE 👩‍🍼 telling platforms 'DONT TARGET JEWS or GTFO' – turn down that HATE VOL 📉😤! No bubble here, just pure TERROR TWIN FLAMES 🔥👬 extinguished by IDF alpha strike 🦁🇮🇱!
